title: Callista eulophota
taxonomy: Callista eulophota is classified within the phylum Mollusca. It belongs to the class Gastropoda and the family Cardiidae. The species is further categorized under the subfamily Cardiinae. Callista eulophota is a genus of saltwater clams, commonly found in tropical and subtropical marine environments. This classification helps scientists understand the evolutionary relationships and ecological roles of this species within its ecosystem.
